zh.lifeSummary: 當John Haydock於1322年出生在英國藍卡爾海多可時，他的父親Gilbert III de Haydock32歲，母親Emma de Houghton18歲。他於1357年11月20日與Lady Joanna Dutton在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1387年12月12日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Haydock于1322年出生在英国藍卡爾海多可时，他的父亲Gilbert III de Haydock32岁，母亲Emma de Houghton18岁。他于1357年11月20日与Lady Joanna Dutton在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1387年12月12日在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃林頓享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Haydock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Czech or Polish Hejduk , Polish, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland), or Czech Hajduk , and of their Hungarian cognate Hajdók. Compare Hydock .

variants.name: Haddock
meanings: variant of the Lancashire surname Haydock , a habitational name from a place so called near Liverpool, which is probably named from Welsh heiddog ‘characterized by barley’.
from the Middle English personal name Addoc, a pet form of Old English Æddi (itself perhaps derived from one of the names in ēad ‘wealth, prosperity’), with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Haydock was born in 1322, in Haydock, Lancashire, England, his father, Gilbert III de Haydock, was 32 and his mother, Emma de Houghton, was 18. He married Lady Joanna Dutton on 20 November 1357, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died on 12 December 1387, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Haydock est né en 1322, à Haydock, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert III de Haydock, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Emma de Houghton, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Lady Joanna Dutton le 20 novembre 1357, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1387, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Haydock 1322 in Haydock, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert III de Haydock 32 und seine Mutter Emma de Houghton 18. Er hat am 20. November 1357 in Lancashire, England Lady Joanna Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1387 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Haydock è nato il nel 1322 nel Haydock, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert III de Haydock, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Houghton, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Lady Joanna Dutton il 20 novembre 1357, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 12 dicembre 1387, nel Warrington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Haydock(이)가 1322년 영국 랭카실르 헤이독에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert III de Haydock(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Houghton(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1357년 11월 20일 영국 랭카실르에서 Lady Joanna Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1387년 12월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.
